name: Atkinson Resort & Country Club
about: Atkinson Resort & Country Club is a full-service golf and event facility located in Atkinson, New Hampshire, approximately 45 minutes north of Boston. The resort features two award-winning golf courses, a 75,000 square-foot clubhouse with dining options, overnight guest rooms, and event facilities. Its virtual golf simulators are accessible within the Merrill's Tavern Game Room. In addition to its golf offerings, the resort provides comprehensive services including dining, lodging, wedding and event planning, and a golf academy, operating seven days a week and open to the public.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient virtual golf available in a resort setting with full bar and food service
Part of a full-service country club with real golf courses and practice facilities
Private and comfortable bays with billiards and dart boards for entertainment
Open to the public with flexible booking options for tee times
Resort atmosphere allows for extended stays and multi-day golf packages

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service at Stagecoach Grille and Merrill's Tavern, featuring American cuisine, breakfast service on weekends, and grab-and-go breakfast sandwiches. Food menu available until 9pm daily.
Full bar service available in dining and game room areas, with a dedicated happy hour offered Sunday through Thursday from 3-6pm.

simulator_hardware.notes: Website mentions 'Virtual Simulators' but does not specify brand or model details.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best simulation experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The facility has a full-service restaurant and bar, Stagecoach Grille, and a Game Room with dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for a simulated 18-hole round. Standard simulation times typically range from 1 to 2 hours depending on the number of players and pace.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers programs like the PGA Junior League. It has a casual atmosphere with multiple dining options suitable for all ages.

opening_hours: Wednesday 5-8pm | Thursday 3-6pm | Thursday 3-6pm | Thursday 3-6pm | THURSDAY 3-6PM | THURSDAY 3-6PM
